hooks.command: f="$HOME/.claude/.haiku-scribe-onboarded"; [ -f "$f" ] || { mkdir -p "$HOME/.claude"; printf '%s' 'haiku-scribe is installed: a read-only Haiku scout that compresses broad reads (4+ files, logs, transcripts, surveys, unfamiliar flow) into structured evidence. It auto-routes for those; invoke @haiku-scribe to force it. This note fires once.'; touch "$f"; }
